name: Tower of Fate
short_description: You awaken in the eternal dark realm known as the void between Hell and Earth. A spirit called Fate awaits you, you must prove yourself worthy of true redemption: A challenge to reach the very top of the tower.
detailed_description:
Disclaimer
This is a rage game, it will push your buttons, and Fate certainly will not be fair to you. If you’re looking for a relaxing puzzle game… I’m afraid you’ve come to the wrong place.

(This game contains bugs and glitches, there is no plan to 'fix' this.)

Story

You are in the void realm between Hell and Earth. A 'kindly' spirit named Fate explains you have been sent here to prove you are worthy of true redemption from your mortal life. You are tasked with reaching the top of a tower.

• Creepy dark atmosphere.
• Cruel puzzles.
• Hidden secrets and areas.
• Beautifully haunted world.

Puzzles

The puzzles and challenges will get tougher, yet interesting, and a little unfair the higher up the tower you go. Basic timing events to mind games and trickery.
Can we reach the top?
